name: task-reminder
description: Send reminders for overdue or upcoming tasks

reminderDaysBefore.description: Days before due date to send reminder

taskStatus.description: Task status to check (e.g., Not Started, In Progress)

emailTemplate.description: Email template ID to use for reminders

elements.instruction: Add a Get Records called Find_Tasks to get Task records where Status equals {{taskStatus}} and ActivityDate equals TODAY() + {{reminderDaysBefore}} days
Add a decision called Check_Tasks with rule Has_Tasks if Find_Tasks has records then Send_Reminders, otherwise End
Add a loop called Loop_Tasks to loop through Find_Tasks
Add an action called Send_Reminder to send email to task owner with subject Reminder: Task due soon
